relatedComponents.name: Time Date Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system. Time Date Picker has 4 columns (Date, Hour, Minute, AM/PM); Time Picker has 3 (Hour, Minute, AM/PM) — no date column.

relatedComponents.name: Month Year Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system.

relatedComponents.name: Number Picker
relatedComponents.relationship: Shares the identical scroll depth visual system.

subComponentsNote: No dedicated sub-components. Self-contained composite of three scroll columns.

anatomy.description: Outer surface. 375px wide, 212px tall. Background: --surface/neutral/default in DS Core. In Customer App context, renders on dark surface --bg-surface-default (#1d1d23). No border, no border-radius.
Horizontal stripe centred vertically, spanning the full width. 31px tall. Marks the active selection row. Image asset in Figma.
Flex row containing all three columns. Centred horizontally with a 4px right offset (left: calc(50% + 4px)). Gap between columns: 27px. Font: Manrope Regular.
Center-aligned. Displays hours in 12-hour format (1–12). 7 visible items. Wraps cyclically.
Center-aligned. Displays minutes (00–59, zero-padded). 7 visible items. Wraps cyclically.
Center-aligned. Displays only AM and PM. Only 2 of 7 slots are populated; all others use opacity: 0. AM selected: AM at pos 4, PM at pos 5. PM selected: AM at pos 3, PM at pos 4.

variants.name: AM
variants.description: AM is the selected period. AM sits at position 4 (centre); PM appears at position 5 below.

variants.name: PM
variants.description: PM is the selected period. AM appears at position 3 above; PM sits at position 4 (centre).

scrollDepthSystem.description: Identical to Time Date Picker, Month Year Picker, and Number Picker. Each column shows 7 items. The selected item is always at position 4 (centre). Size and opacity decrease symmetrically toward the edges.

columnGroup.note: Confirmed from Figma: left: calc(50% + 4px). TODO: Confirm whether intentional.

amPm.note: The AM/PM column functions as a binary toggle within the drum metaphor. Only positions 3, 4, and 5 may contain visible values. All other positions are opacity: 0.

typography.note: Identical to Time Date Picker, Month Year Picker, and Number Picker. All items use Regular weight regardless of selection state.

popupContext.screen: Chat view — Blue Marlin Reservation (Ibiza Week · Jun 9th)
popupContext.triggerComponent: Dojo AI chat message — 'Select Time' select button
popupContext.confirmAction: "Confirm Time" primary button — applies the selection

usageContext: Placed inside a bottom-sheet popup when the user needs to select a time of day.
Confirmed in Dojo Customer App: 'Choose arrive time' popup triggered by the Dojo AI chat assistant in a restaurant/venue reservation flow.
TODO: Confirm whether Time Picker is used in other app contexts beyond the reservation chat flow.
notes: Time Picker (3 columns) is distinct from Time Date Picker (4 columns). Do not conflate them.
The scroll depth visual system is identical to Time Date Picker, Month Year Picker, and Number Picker — all four must be updated together if the system changes.
The selection indicator is an image asset in Figma — implementation should use a CSS equivalent.
The AM/PM column uses opacity: 0 for unpopulated slots — consistent with Month Year Picker.
The column group has a confirmed 4px right offset from centre. TODO: Verify whether intentional or a Figma artefact.
TODO: Confirm whether Time Picker appears in other screens beyond the reservation chat flow.
